evidence.quote: In 2019, using the FTMap and its modified version FTSite, a large-scale study was carried out to identify allosteric sites in 17 GPCRs... For allosteric sites located within the TMD... the predictive ability of the FTMap and FTSite was 80 and 88%, respectively.
predictive ability of the FTMap and FTSite was 80 and 88%, respectively.

Molecular dynamics methods can also be used to search for allosteric sites... identification and study of allosteric sites located on the outer-lateral surface of the TM7 bundle... as was recently shown for beta2-AR, glucagon receptor, M2-muscarinic receptor, P2Y1 purinergic receptor, D2-dopamine receptor, type 2 proteinase-activated receptor (PAR2), and C5a anaphylatoxin chemotactic 1 receptor

using the in-silico docking of small molecules probes, during which 557 GPCR structures for 113 receptors were studied [61]... for receptors of the largest class A... up to 11 allosteric sites were identified... and up to 8 sites that can be considered as potential allosteric sites.
the most important of which is the negatively charged aspartic acid located in TM2... and the replacement of aspartic acid with alanine blocks the NAM activity of these ions

step_scores.label: unsupported_or_contradicted

evidence.quote: 423. Ahn, S... Small-Molecule Positive Allosteric Modulators of the beta2-Adrenoceptor Isolated from DNA-Encoded Libraries. 424. Meng, K... Cmpd-15 Derivatives as Negative Allosteric Modulators for the beta2-Adrenergic Receptor.

step_scores.fix_suggestion: Separate the claims: DNA-encoded libraries identified PAMs (Ref 423), and Cmpd-15 is a NAM (Ref 424). Do not claim Cmpd-15 came from DEL without text evidence.
